1 7 (54)- O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One ! If she be near her time, which is the worshipper of Mazda that shall support her ?

18 (56). Ahura Mazda answered: ' If a man come near unto a damsel, either dependent on the chief of the family or not dependent, either delivered [unto a husband] or not delivered, and she conceives by him, so long shall he support her, until the child be born ^ ^9 (58). * If he shall not support her* . . . • ' It lies with the faithful to look in the same way after every pregnant female, either two-footed or fourfooted, two-footed woman or four-footed bitch/ III.
20 (61). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One 1 If (a bitch ^) be near her time, which is the worshipper of Mazda that shall support her ?
21 (63). Ahura Mazda answered: 'He whose house stands nearest, the care of supporting her is his * ; so long shall he support her, until the whelps be born.
22 (65). * If he shall not support her, so that the ' § i8=§ 15.

' The senience is left unfinished : Frdmjt fills it with the words in § 16, 'so that the child,' &c. It seems as if §§ 17, 18 were no part of the original text, and as if § 17 were a mere repetition of § 20, which being wrongly interpreted as referring to a woman would have brought about the repetition of § 15 as an answer. See § 20.

' The subject is wanting in the text: it is supplied from the Commentary and from the sense, has its door nearest shall take care of her. If she dies, he shall carry her off [to dispose of the body according to the law]. One must support her for at least three nights : if one cannot support her any longer, one intrusts her to a richer man' (Comm. and Frdmji).

FARGARD XV. l8l whelps come to grief, for want of proper support, he shall pay for it the penalty for wilful murder/ 23 (68). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One ! If a bitch be near her time and be lying in a stable for camels, w^hich is the worshipper of Mazda that shall support her ?
24 (70). Ahura Mazda answered : * He who buift the stable for camels or whoso holds it *, the care of supporting her is his ; so long shall he support her, until the whelps be born.
25 (76). * If he shall not support her, so that the whelps come to grief, for want of proper support, he shall pay for it the penalty for wilful murder.'
26 (77). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One ! If a bitch be near her time and be lying in a stable for horses, which is the worshipper of Mazda that shall support her ?
27 (78), Ahura Mazda answered : ' He who built the stable for horses or whoso holds it, the care of supporting her is his ; so long shall he support her, until the whelps be born.
28 (81). * If he shall not support her, so that the whelps come to grief, for want of proper support, he shall pay for it the penalty for wilful murder.'
29 (84). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One! If a bitch be near her time and be lying in a stable for oxen, which is the worshipper of Mazda that shall support her ?
30 (86). Ahura Mazda answered : * He who built the stable for oxen or whoso holds it, the care of supporting her is his ; so long shall he support her, until the whelps be born.

41 (113). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One ! If a bitch be near her time and be lying in the middle of a pasture-field, which is the worshipper of Mazda that shall support her ?

42 (115). Ahura Mazda answered: *He who sowed the pasture-field or whoso holds it, the care of supporting her is his ; [so long shall he support her, until the whelps be bom. If he shall not support her, so that the whelps come to grief, for want of proper support, he shall pay for it the penalty for wilful murder.] 43 (i I?)' * He shall take her to r?st upon a litter of nemdva^ta or of any foliage fit for a litter ; so long shall he support her, until the young dogs are capable of self-defence and self-subsistence.'
44 (122). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One! When are the dogs capable of selfdefence and self-subsistence?

17（54）—啊，物質世界的造物主，你聖聖者！若她臨近產期，則馬茲達的哪位信奉者應當扶助她？
阿胡拉‧瑪茲達回答：「若有人接近一名少女，無論她是依附於家族首領的或不依附的，無論她已許配給丈夫或未許配，而她因他而懷孕，則他應當供養她，直到孩子出生為止。^9 (58). *若他不供養她*……‧「忠實的信徒應當以同樣的方式照顧每一位懷孕的母親，無論是兩足或四足的，兩足的女人或四足的母犬。」III.
20 (61). 啊，物質世界的造物者，至聖者！如果（一隻母犬^）臨近產期，那麼哪位馬茲達的崇拜者應當扶助她呢？
21 (63). 阿胡拉‧馬茲達答曰：「其宅舍最近者，扶養她之責任歸於他*；直至幼仔誕生，他應當扶養她至彼時。」

我注意到您提供的英文原文片段（"If he shall not support her, so that the ' § i8=§ 15."）似乎不完整或有編碼錯誤，無法理解其完整含義。 這段文字可能是： - 原始掃描文本的OCR識別錯誤 - 頁碼註腳或法律引述的片段 - 排版或傳輸過程中的損毀 請提供： 1. 完整的英文句子或段落 2. 原始出處的上下文 3. 或確認這是否為《宗教學導論》中的實際文本 這樣我才能提供準確的繁體中文翻譯。
這個句子是不完整的：弗德蒙特（Frdmjt）以第16節的措詞補完它：「使得那孩子」云云。看起來第17、18節並非原文的一部分，第17節似乎只是第20節的重複，由於對第20節的誤解將其解釋為涉及一位女性，因而引發了對第15節作為回答的重複。見第20節。
該文本中缺少主語，由註疏與義理予以補足，「其門最近者應當照料她。若她死亡，他應將其抬走[按照法律處置遺體]。一人必須至少扶養她三個夜晚；若一人無法繼續扶養，則將其託付給更富有的人」（《註疏》及弗里德曼基）。
《法爾加德》第十五篇‧181 若因缺乏適當的扶持而幼畜遭害，他應當為此支付故意謀殺之罰。23 (68) 物質世界的造物者啊，聖者啊！若一隻母犬臨產在即，卧於駱駝圈舍中，哪位馬茲達信徒應當扶助她呢？
24 (70). 阿胡拉‧瑪茲達答道：「凡建造駱駝馬廄或持有駱駝者，支撐她的責任便歸於他；他應當支撐她，直到幼駝生產為止。」
25 (76). * 若他不予以贍養，致使幼子因缺乏適當的撫養而遭厄運，他應為此支付故意殺人罪的罰金。
26 (77). 物質世界的製造者啊，至聖者！若有一隻母犬臨近產期，躺臥在馬廄裡，哪位馬茲達（Mazda）的信仰者應當扶助她呢？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答：「誰建造了馬廄，或誰持有它，照顧和供養它就是他的責任；他應當供養它，直到幼駒出生為止。
28 (81). * 「若他不供養她，致使幼仔因缺乏適當照顧而遭遇不幸，他應就故意謀殺罪支付罰金。」
29 (84). 物質世界的造物主啊，神聖者！若一隻母犬臨近產期，臥於牛棚之中，則何位馬茲達的崇拜者應當扶助她？
30 (86). 阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答道：「凡建造牲畜圈舍或掌管圈舍者，照顧和供養牲畜乃是他的責任；他應當供養牲畜，直到小牛出生為止。」

阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答道：「凡建造羊舍者，或凡據有羊舍者，照顧牲口乃其責任；他應當照顧她，直到幼羊生下來為止。

42 (115)。阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答道：「凡播種牧地者或占有牧地者，供養母犬乃其責任；[直到幼犬出生之時，他應予以供養。若他未能供養母犬，以致幼犬因缺乏適當照顧而喪命，他應為此付出故意殺人罪的懲罰。] 43 (i I?)'「他應將母犬安置於 nemdva^ta 或任何適合作為墊褥的草葉之上休息；直到幼犬具有自衛與自給自足的能力，他應繼續供養母犬。」
44 (122)。啊，物質世界的創造者，汝至聖者！犬何時才具有自衛與自給自足之能力？
